arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag 'mad' over Manchester United defeat as he opens up on talks with decision makers
arts.sum: Three Premier League defeats and 12th place spell trouble for Erik ten Hag, but he will manage Man United in their next two games.

arts.ttl: Manchester United suffer fresh Mason Mount setback and give updates on Luke Shaw and Tyrell Malacia
arts.sum: The injury-prone Mason Mount is out injured again for Man United while their left backs are still recovering from injury.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa suffer major double injury scare before Manchester United match
arts.sum: The latest Man United news after Aston Villa midfielders Jacob Ramsey and Amadou Onana were taken off during their Champions League game with Bayern Munich due to injury.

arts.ttl: Porto manager makes classy Erik ten Hag offer amid Manchester United sack pressure
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure heading into Thursday night's Europa League game away to FC Porto.

arts.ttl: Man United flop struggles to hold back emotions after scoring his first goal in over TWO years following Old Trafford nightmare
arts.sum: The player was on target in the Champions League on Wednesday night. He endured a hugely frustrating time at Old Trafford prior to leaving United this summer.

arts.ttl: Team News: Porto vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Porto and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag 'lacks passion' says former Man Utd coach
arts.sum: Former Red Devils coach Benni McCarthy believes Erik ten Hag lacks the 'passion' to manage a team like Manchester United. McCarthy, however, thinks it's Ten Hag's lack of desire and passion that fails to bring him results.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Europa League preparations plunged into chaos just 24 hours before Porto clash
arts.sum: Manchester United face Porto on Thursday, looking to get their first win on the board in the Europa League after drawing their opening game with Dutch side Twente 1-1 last week

arts.ttl: Ex-Ten Hag assistant reveals bitter TRUTH about Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Benni McCarthy believes that Erik ten Hag lacks the 'passion' to succeed at Manchester United . "In modern football, I believe that players want to see a bit more passion in their coach.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's preparations for Man United's crunch game against Porto are thrown into disarray just 24 hours before kick-off
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER IN PORTO: Erik ten Hag landed in wind and rain on Portugal's Atlantic coast on Wednesday looking for whatever he can get to take the heat off himself and his beleaguered team. Any Porto in a storm and all that.
